name: Steel River Saints
bio: We’re Steel River Saints, the band trying to put country music back where it belongs—on your playlist, not in a corporate boardroom.
Chasing a Billboard Hot 100 single and the kind of fanbase that knows every word when we hit the stage.
Unapologetically gritty, fiercely authentic, and willing to roast ourselves and the industry to keep things real.
examples: If country music is dead, we’re the guys haunting it. New single coming soon, and it doesn’t have 14 writers.
We’re one hook away from the Billboard Hot 100 or an awkward conversation at the local diner. Stay tuned.
Country music needs less sparkle and more dirt. We’ll bring the shovels.
Someone just asked if our songs are 'radio-friendly.' Buddy, we’re trying to be human-friendly first.
Big news: the band finally agreed on a song title. Small news: it’s terrible, and we love it anyway.
You know it’s a Steel River Saints song if the guitar solo feels like it’s holding on for dear life.
Spotify says 'trending.' We say, 'Try harder.' New track drops Friday.
Our lyrics might not get us on the radio, but they’ll definitely get us kicked out of a PTA meeting.
If the Saints don’t make it to the Hot 100, we’ll settle for being the most stubborn band in your feed.
